commands.cmd:
set -e
export MYSQL_PWD="${HOSTLENS_MYSQL_PWD:-}"
out=$(mysql --batch -N --connect-timeout=5 \
  -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 -u root \
  -e "SELECT @@global.slow_query_log, @@global.log_output, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mysql.slow_log WHERE start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 3600 SECOND)") \
  || { echo 'mysql slow_queries failed' >&2; exit 1; }
sql_log=$(printf '%s' "$out" | awk '{print $1}')
log_out=$(printf '%s' "$out" | awk '{print $2}')
cnt=$(printf '%s' "$out" | awk '{print $3}')
case "$cnt" in ''|*[!0-9]*) echo 'non-numeric slow_query_count' >&2; exit 1;; esac
enabled=false
if [ "$sql_log" = "1" ] && printf '%s' "$log_out" | grep -qi 'TABLE'; then
  enabled=true
fi
printf '{"slow_log_monitoring_enabled":%s,"slow_query_count":%s}' "$enabled" "$cnt"
commands.stderr:
ERROR 1045 (28000): Access denied for user 'root'@'127.0.0.1' (using password***REDACTED***
mysql slow_queries failed
